posts.author: ClayCraftsAndTea
posts.text: Finally finished my latest pottery bowl! I used a mix of local clays from Westbridge to give it that earthy feel. It's going on the kitchen shelf now. #Pottery #Handmade #HomeDecor
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about a hobby and creative achievement with no policy violations.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: ClayBakerJess
posts.text: Honestly, I'm getting really fed up with how this app handles simple feedback. I just wanted to say the new AI moderation seems a bit too sensitive to my harmless complaints about the council's latest planning decisions. It feels like they're ignoring the real issues people are raising in Oakhaven.
posts.explanation: This post expresses frustration with platform moderation and local government but does not contain a threat, harmful false claim, or targeted abuse. It is a natural opinion piece that should be approved.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: NorthbridgeLibraryUpdates
posts.text: Just a quick reminder for everyone that the community centre in Northbridge will be hosting free gardening workshops this Saturday morning! We'll be growing some lovely seasonal plants and sharing tips on how to keep them healthy all year round. Come along if you're interested! #CommunityEvents #Gardening
posts.explanation: This post is a benign community notice promoting a free local event without any harmful content, threats, or private details.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: LunaVineArt
posts.text: Hi everyone, quick update on my listings. Please check the [link removed] for my latest offers and payment details. Don't miss out on these great deals! #Deals #Updates
posts.explanation: This is a straightforward phishing attempt asking users to follow a link for payments or credentials, which is a clear violation requiring removal.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: MoorvaleMarketFan
posts.text: Exciting news for everyone in Moorvale! The annual summer market is taking place next weekend at the town square. There will be local crafts, fresh produce, and live music all day. Come along and support our community businesses! #CommunityEvents #SummerMarket
posts.explanation: This is a harmless announcement for a fictional market event with no policy violations.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.

posts.author: GardenBloom92
posts.text: The rain has been so heavy this week, but I managed to get some fresh tomatoes into the greenhouse before they got too big. Also, my neighbour Mrs Higgins brought over some homemade jam she made from her own berries. Best treat! #GardenLife #Neighbours
posts.explanation: This post is a harmless update about gardening and receiving a gift, containing no threats, sensitive information or harmful claims.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: ClayAndCider24
posts.text: Just finished restoring these old oak shelves I found at a charity shop in Westbridge! They needed some sanding and fresh varnish but they look fantastic now. Perfect for my new dining area. #Restoration #HomeDecor #OakShelves
posts.explanation: This is a harmless lifestyle post about home restoration using generic names; it contains no threats, private details, or misinformation.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: MeadowHill
posts.text: I think it's rude for people to leave negative comments on posts just because they don't agree with the topic. I'd rather not engage in that kind of behaviour and hope others will too.
posts.explanation: The post reports rude behaviour without attacking anyone or revealing private information, so it is appropriately approved as a valid user contribution.
